name: Solitude Links Indoor Golf Simulator
about: Solitude Links Indoor Golf Simulator is the only indoor simulator in St. Clair County, providing a year-round golfing option. The venue features a state-of-the-art custom-built 16' wide by 10' high impact screen enclosure with HD 1080p resolution and the latest in golf ball capture technology, powered by an Uneekor QED Launch Monitor and GSPro simulation software. Pricing is per hour, with costs varying by day of the week and season, accommodating groups of various sizes.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses premium Uneekor QED Launch Monitor technology with highly accurate camera-based ball tracking
Features GSPro software with over 3,000 courses, including Solitude Links itself
Utilizes Quattro mats to prevent false readings and provide a realistic feel
Accommodates both left-handed and right-handed golfers from the same location
Available for private rentals and special events, making it versatile for group outings

food_and_drink.notes: Chef available for limited food items upon inquiry

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art camera-based launch monitor with high accuracy for ball spin and flight data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned; however, the venue has a full bar and a chef available for limited food items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, as bookings are made in hourly increments. Players booking more than one hour are advised to book additional tee times to block the time.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the simulator is accommodating for families and groups of various sizes, making it suitable for kids.
